title: William Alexander of the Netherlands becomes King of the Netherlands
fact: Willem-Alexander is the current King of the Netherlands, having reigned since 30 April 2013.

title: Beatrix of the Netherlands becomes Queen of the Netherlands
fact: Beatrix is a member of the Dutch royal house who reigned as Queen of the Netherlands from 30 April 1980 until her abdication in 2013.

title: Juliana of the Netherlands becomes Queen of the Netherlands
fact: Juliana was Queen of the Netherlands from 1948 until her abdication in 1980.

title: Wilhelmina of the Netherlands becomes Queen of the Netherlands
fact: Wilhelmina was Queen of the Netherlands from 1890 until her abdication in 1948.

title: William I of the Netherlands becomes King of the Netherlands
fact: William I was King of the Netherlands and Grand Duke of Luxembourg from 1815 until his abdication in 1840.

title: William III of the Netherlands becomes King of the Netherlands
fact: William III was King of the Netherlands and Grand Duke of Luxembourg from 1849 until his death in 1890, and was also the Duke of Limburg from 1849 until the abolition of the duchy in 1866.

title: William II of the Netherlands becomes King of the Netherlands
fact: William II was King of the Netherlands, Grand Duke of Luxembourg, and Duke of Limburg.
